channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BIOCON] Biocon: Monitoring Agency Report on QIP Proceeds
item.description:
Biocon Ltd's board reviewed the Monitoring Agency Report by India Ratings & Research for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of proceeds from Qualified Institutions Placements (QIP). The report indicates no deviation from the stated objectives. This review complies with SEBI regulations and is available on the company's website.

  • Biocon's board reviewed the Monitoring Agency Report for Q1 2026.
  • India Ratings & Research found no deviation from QIP objectives.
  • Report complies with SEBI regulations.
  • Audit Committee also reviewed the report.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIOCON LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [STLNETWORK] STL Networks Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
STL Networks Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also re-appointed KPMG Assurance And Consulting Services LLP as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27. The meeting, held on May 7, 2026, commenced at 20:15 hours and concluded at 21:45 hours. The company confirms it is not a Large Corporate as per SEBI criteria. The results and related disclosures are available on the company's website.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • KPMG Assurance re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Confirmed Nil deviation(s) in utilization of Non-Convertible Debenture issue proceeds.
  • Company confirms it is not a Large Corporate as per SEBI criteria.
  • Board meeting commenced at 20:15 hours and concluded at 21:45 hours.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STL Networks Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [STLNETWORK] STL Networks Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
STL Networks Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of KPMG Assurance And Consulting Services LLP as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The meeting, held on May 07, 2026, commenced at 20:15 hours and concluded at 21:45 hours. The company confirms it is not a Large Corporate as per SEBI criteria.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • KPMG Assurance re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Confirmed Nil deviation(s) for Non-Convertible Debentures issue proceeds.
  • Company confirms it is not a Large Corporate as per SEBI.
  • Board meeting commenced at 20:15 hours and concluded at 21:45 hours.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STL Networks Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GCSL] Gretex Corporate Services Re-appoints Jay Gupta as Joint Auditor
item.description:
Gretex Corporate Services Ltd's board re-appointed M/s. Jay Gupta & Associates as Joint Statutory Auditors for a second term of 5 years, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming 18th Annual General Meeting. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, appointed D.A. Kamat & Co as Secretarial Auditor, re-appointed Ajmera & Ajmera as Internal Auditor, and recommended a final dividend of ₹ 0.70 per share. The 18th AGM will be held on July 31, 2026.

  • Jay Gupta & Associates re-appointed as Joint Statutory Auditor for 5 years, subject to shareholder approval.
  • D.A. Kamat & Co appointed as Secretarial Auditor for 5 years, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Ajmera & Ajmera re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Board recommends a final dividend of ₹ 0.70 per share.
  • 18th AGM scheduled for July 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gretex Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [STLNETWORK] STL Networks Re-appoints KPMG as Internal Auditor
item.description:
STL Networks Ltd's Board of Directors, in its meeting on May 07, 2026, approved the re-appointment of KPMG Assurance And Consulting Services LLP as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The board also approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting commenced at 20:15 hours and concluded at 21:45 hours. The company confirmed it is not a Large Corporate as per SEBI criteria.

  • KPMG Assurance And Consulting Services LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Audited financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Company confirms it is not classified as a Large Corporate as per SEBI guidelines.
  • Board meeting held on May 07, 2026, from 20:15 to 21:45 hours.
  • Standalone and consolidated financial results were approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STL Networks Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ALLSEC] Alldigi Tech Q4 FY26: Revenue up 5.9% YoY, EBITDA up 24.2%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Alldigi Tech Ltd (formerly Allsec Technologies Limited) announced its Q4 FY26 financial results, reporting a 5.9% YoY increase in revenue from operations and a 24.2% YoY increase in EBITDA, driven by growth in Tech & Digital (T&D). Consolidated revenue for Q4'26 stood at ₹154.7 Cr, with EBITDA at ₹43.7 Cr and PAT at ₹28.9 Cr. For FY26, revenue reached ₹598.7 Cr, EBITDA at ₹162.0 Cr and PAT at ₹82.2 Cr. The company's international revenue contributed 67.3% of total revenues.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue from operations increased by 5.9% YoY.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA increased by 24.2% YoY.
  • Tech & Digital revenue up 22.3% YoY in Q4 FY26.
  • BPM revenue flat YoY in Q4 FY26 at ₹110.4 Cr.
  • FY26 revenue reached ₹598.7 Cr, a 9.6% increase YoY.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALLSEC TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KIRLFER] Kirloskar Ferrous Q4 FY26: Revenue ₹1781 Cr, EBITDA Margin 12.7%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Ltd. has announced its Q4 FY26 and FY26 financial highlights. The company reported a Q4 revenue of ₹1781 Cr with an EBITDA margin of 12.7%. The full-year FY26 revenue stood at ₹6784 Cr with an EBITDA margin of 12.3%. The announcement was made alongside a presentation for the investors call scheduled for May 8, 2026.

  • Kirloskar Ferrous Q4 FY26 revenue is ₹1781 Cr.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA margin stands at 12.7%.
  • FY 2026 revenue reached ₹6784 Cr.
  • FY 2026 EBITDA margin is reported at 12.3%.
  • Sector tailwinds are noted across KFIL's key end-user industries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRLOSKAR FERROUS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SHAKTIPUMP] Shakti Pumps FY26 Revenue Up to ₹26,976 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shakti Pumps India Ltd reported its highest-ever revenue for the quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. Consolidated revenue reached ₹26,976 Mn in FY26 and ₹8,578 Mn in Q4 FY26. Receivables reduced significantly by over ₹4,200 Mn. The company installed 86,086 solar pumps during FY26, a 20% YoY growth. The order book stands at approximately ₹15,000 Mn as of May 7, 2026. EBITDA margins were impacted by lower realization in the Magel Tyala Scheme, elevated raw material costs, and high logistics costs.

  • Highest-ever consolidated revenue in Q4 FY26 at ₹8,578 Mn.
  • FY26 revenue also recorded highest-ever at ₹26,976 Mn.
  • Receivables reduced by ₹4,200 Mn from December 31, 2025, to March 31, 2026.
  • Company installed 86,086 solar pumps during FY26, a 20% YoY growth.
  • Order book of approximately ₹15,000 Mn as of May 7, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHAKTI PUMPS (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PARAGMILK] Parag Milk Foods FY26 PAT up 19% to ₹141 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Parag Milk Foods Ltd reported FY26 revenue of ₹3,818 Cr, up 11% YoY, with a volume growth of 5%. Q4 FY26 revenue stood at ₹945 Cr, a 3% increase YoY, despite a 5% volume decline. The New Age Business segment grew by 91% in FY26, contributing 10% to the total turnover. FY26 Profit After Tax (PAT) was ₹141 Cr, reflecting a 19% YoY growth. The company's core categories, including ghee, cheese, and paneer, experienced robust volume and value growth.

  • FY26 Revenue at ₹3,818 Cr, up 11% YoY; Volume growth 5%.
  • FY26 Profit After Tax (PAT) at ₹141 Cr, up 19% YoY.
  • New Age Business grew 91% in FY26, contributing 10% to total turnover.
  • Gowardhan Ghee commands 22% market share in the branded cow ghee segment.
  • Cheese brand “Go” holds 35% market share in the Cheese category.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parag Milk Foods Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar: FY26 Audited Results Approved; CFO Changes
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from auditors Walker Chandiok & Co. LLP and A Prasad & Associates. The board also approved a postal ballot notice for amendments to the ESOP plan and granting options to employees of subsidiary/holding companies. M/s AAPT & Associates were re-appointed as internal auditors. Rajat Kumar Singh resigned as Group CFO, effective May 8, 2026, and Arun Chopra was appointed as the new CFO from the same date.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved with unmodified auditor opinion.
  • Postal ballot notice approved for ESOP amendments and option grants.
  • AAPT & Associates re-appointed as internal auditors for six months.
  • Rajat Kumar Singh resigned as Group CFO, effective May 8, 2026.
  • Arun Chopra appointed as CFO, effective May 8, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
